title: Bridge Paper: Absorption and spiritual experience: A review of evidence and potential mechanisms.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.
**Phase context:** self-transcendence, transcendence, cosmic consciousness, mystical experience, awe

Paper: Absorption and spiritual experience: A review of evidence and potential mechanisms.
DOI: 10.1016/j.concog.2019.05.008
Abstract: Some people seem to have a 'talent' for spiritual experience: they readily sense the presence of supernatural beings, receive special messages from God, and report intense feelings of self-transcendence, awe and wonder. Here we review converging strands of evidence to argue that the trait of 'absorption' captures a general proclivity for having spiritual experiences. Participants scoring highly on the Tellegen Absorption Scale report vivid experiences of hearing God's voice during prayer, intens
